top_signals.title: Emerging Currencies Extend Rebound on Optimism Over Iran Talks
top_signals.summary: Emerging-market currencies extended an earlier rebound after US President Donald Trump said the US is in the “final stages” of peace negotiations with Iran.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: EU mulls Merkel or Draghi as possible Putin whisperer
top_signals.summary: Momentum gathers for Europe to appoint its own representative as US-led talks on Ukraine stall
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Nvidia to launch Singapore research hub as city-state boosts AI plans
top_signals.summary: Singapore has announced a new Nvidia research center and its first testbed to research, test and deploy physical AI, along with industry leaders.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Marc Rowan accused of misusing Apollo resources for political work
top_signals.summary: Chief executive of private capital group used company email and staff for lobbying, unions say
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: EIG’s MidOcean Energy Announces $120m Investment from The Arab Energy Fund as Part of Equity Raise
top_signals.summary: MidOcean Energy (“MidOcean” or the “Company”), a liquefied natural gas (LNG) company formed and managed by EIG, today announced a $120 million equity investment from The Arab Energy Fund (‘’TAEF’’), a leading multilateral impact financial institution, as part of its current equity capital raise. This press release features multimedia. View the full release here: https://www.businesswire.com/news/home/20260520063539/en/ [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
